The text "HELLO" and "123" are printed on it. The square has a red background.

In the foreground of this outdoor picture we can see grass and plants with flowers. In the middle portion there are groups of trees and plants along with some objects on ground which seems to be a couple of persons sitting on chairs or benches under shade provided by tree canopy.
